title: narcissus × dordae
intro: Narcissus × dordae, also known as the dordae narcissus or dordae hybrid narcissus, is a hybrid flowering plant in the genus Narcissus, typically growing to be about 10-15 inches tall. The plant has medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, due to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of narcissus × dordae include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of certain infections. The herbal preparations of narcissus × dordae often include infusions of the plant's flowers or bulbs, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
